extension.description: Turn agent-made files into verified browser previews and share them in one click. / 将 Agent 生成的文件转成已验证的网页预览，一键分享。
configuration.title: SoloDrop
configuration.deploymentMode.auto: Use the signed-in Cloudflare account when available, otherwise create a 60-minute temporary preview.
configuration.deploymentMode.temporary: Always create an unauthenticated 60-minute temporary preview.
configuration.deploymentMode.authenticat: Require an authenticated Wrangler session and create a persistent preview.
configuration.confirmBeforeUpload.descri: Show the exact file and size before it is uploaded.
configuration.language.auto: Follow the VS Code display language.
configuration.language.description: Language used by the SoloDrop sidebar and notifications.
